// Coverage Gutters: Paints gutter marks from a local `bazel coverage //...` run. Bazel writes the merged lcov to bazel-out/_coverage/_coverage_report.dat; search is scoped there.
// Repo-health checks on save: These scripts used to run in pre-commit. Moved out of pre-commit so they don't gate commits, and now run via VS Code tasks (see tasks.json) instead of emeraldwalk.runonsave. The matchers in tasks.json turn each `path:line: message` failure into a Problems-panel entry with a squiggle at the offending line, which the earlier output-channel printing did not. Install gruntfuggly.triggertaskonsave (recommended in extensions.json) to wire saves to tasks.
